text: The dim, purplish lighting and the slanted angle of my vision disorient me. Here, in a quiet intersection of corridors and technical displays, I feel as though I've stepped inside an experiment—one that tests the boundary between sterile institution and creative potential. Shadows and neon suggest anticipation, an unknown waiting just behind glass. I am alert, both uneasy and intrigued, a witness to the strange poetry formed by artifice, technology, and silence.
